---
author: Sam White
toc-title: Contents
toc-depth: 5
toc-location: left
title: FastQC MultiQC - Andy Dittman Preliminary RNA-seq Data on Hyak
date: '2026-05-19'
draft: true
engine: knitr
execute:
  eval: false
categories: 
  - "2026"
---


# VARIABLES
```{r set-variables}
# DIRECTORIES
raw_reads_dir <- "/mmfs1/gscratch/scrubbed/samwhite/data/dittman_grc_rnaseq_1/"
output_dir <- "/mmfs1/gscratch/scrubbed/samwhite/outputs/20260519-FastQC-MultiQC-dittman-grc-rnaseq/"

# FILES
hifiasm_asm <- "crog-macho-pb-hifiasm-assembly.asm"
hifiasm_primary_graph <- "crog-macho-pb-hifiasm-assembly.asm.bp.p_ctg.gfa"
hifiasm_assembly_fasta <- "crog-macho-pb-hifiasm-assembly.fa"
hifiasm_assembly_log <- "crog-macho-pb-hifiasm-assembly.log"

# PROGRAMS
gfatools <- c("/srlab/programs/gfatools/gfatools")
hifiasm <- c("/srlab/programs/miniforge3-24.7.1-0/envs/hifiasm-0.25.0_env/bin/hifiasm")


# SETTINGS
threads <- "32"


# Export these as environment variables for bash chunks.
Sys.setenv(
  raw_reads_dir = raw_reads_dir,
  output_dir = output_dir,
  threads = threads
)
```
